Smith ADC#165238 & Williams ADC#171549 fighting 8 Barracks
~10:15pm
Williams cut over left eye, bleeding
Smith on top throwing punches when I arrived
Sgt Peterman pulled Smith off, cuffed him
Cpl Powell cuffed Williams
Both escorted to Restrictive Housing by Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns
Williams seen by Infirmary — 3 sutures to eyebrow
Smith refused medical
Photos taken of Williams injuries & blood on floor
Lt Roberts notified 10:20pm
Both inmates claimed the other started it
Williams said "that pussy been running his mouth all week, I told him I'd fuck him up"
